game_name: Populous II: Trials of the Olympian Gods

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this strategy game

special_mechanics.name: Divine Intervention Powers
special_mechanics.description: Player can cast various spells across six categories (earth, water, wind, fire, plants, people). Powers deplete manna meter which regenerates based on population over time. 29 powers available in SNES version (30 in PC).

special_mechanics.name: Hero Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can transform leader into one of six legendary Greek mythological figures that wander the map attacking enemies

special_mechanics.name: Ancient Greek Monsters
special_mechanics.description: When one side controls ~75% of map, indestructible monsters (Colossus, Medusa) spawn and wander indiscriminately, leaving trails of destruction

special_mechanics.name: Fungus Growth
special_mechanics.description: Deadly fungus power that grows according to Conway's Game of Life rules, kills units stepping on it

tier_notes: Tier 3: Populous II is a god game/strategy title, not a character action platformer. No direct character movement physics are documented in available sources. The game focuses on spell-casting, population management, and tactical map control rather than precise movement parameters. Wikipedia source contains only high-level gameplay mechanics without movement, physics, or technical specifications.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Populous II: Trials of the Olympian Gods
